description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a modern, minimalist design. The structure sits on a broad, flat rectangular base, with the main living area forming a simple rectangular volume. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with clean lines and a flat roof that extends slightly beyond the walls. There are a few small, square windows and a single entryway, all arranged in a sparse, functional pattern. The overall color is a uniform white, giving the building a sleek, contemporary appearance. The lack of decorative elements or a visible porch emphasizes its utilitarian, modernist style.
description: A small, modern white bungalow with a flat roof, minimal windows, and a clean, rectangular form. The design is simple and functional, with a smooth exterior and no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway and a small window on the right side of the facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a small window and the depth of the rectangular living area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall and minimal window openings, emphasizing the building's simplicity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a few small windows and the flat roof extending over the edge.
